articles.author: Bryan Fischer, Kevin Sweeney, Pat Forde
articles.title: March Madness Brackets: Expert Predictions for the 2026 Men’s Sweet 16 - Sports Illustrated
articles.description: Sports Illustrated reset their picks now that the NCAA men’s tournament Sweet 16 is set and select which teams will advance to the Final Four in Indianapolis.
articles.content: Ahead of the Sweet 16, Sports Illustrateds Pat Forde, Kevin Sweeney and Bryan Fischer reset their brackets and make their picks through to the Final Four in Indianapolis. Many picks remain the same a… [+2896 chars]
